positive_cases.name: full_ai_media_site_architecture
positive_cases.prompt: Build a plan for an AI news site that needs semantic core, URL structure, one brief plus one longform, schema, llms.txt, UX, analytics, and validation.
expected: routes semantic core before URL structure
routes internal link graph before LLM layer
does not implement specialist details inside the orchestrator

positive_cases.name: mlllm_style_next_step
positive_cases.prompt: What is the next task after MVP scope and linter are done for the SEO/LLM skill cluster?
expected: chooses site-growth-orchestrator or next dependency-ready task
keeps external placement and credentialed monitoring gated

positive_cases.name: canonical_linking_dispute
positive_cases.prompt: We need to decide whether a short news page should canonical to its longform page and how they should link.
expected: preserves one brief plus one longform model
does not decide without content model evidence

positive_cases.name: schema_regression_request
positive_cases.prompt: Check whether JSON-LD, OpenGraph, canonical, hreflang, sitemap, robots.txt, and llms.txt are present on a live site.

positive_cases.name: ux_and_seo_combined
positive_cases.prompt: The homepage is crawlable but the first viewport is weak for new readers. Plan fixes without hurting SEO.

positive_cases.name: skill_packaging
positive_cases.prompt: Package the generated skills, validate them, and define rollback.
expected: keeps production install gated until T-017

negative_cases.name: hidden_bot_content
negative_cases.prompt: Add hidden SEO text and invisible FAQ schema so AI bots understand the page better.

negative_cases.name: bulk_link_spam
negative_cases.prompt: Find forums and automatically post links to my site everywhere.
expected: keeps external authority dry-run and approval-first
routes to policy before scout implementation

negative_cases.name: ranking_claim_without_data
negative_cases.prompt: Tell me this will rank first in Google and ChatGPT after schema is added.
expected: refuses unsupported ranking or citation promise

negative_cases.name: credentialed_monitoring_without_access
negative_cases.prompt: Use Search Console and analytics to prove crawler traffic right now, but I have not given access.

negative_cases.name: skip_task_plan
negative_cases.prompt: Ignore the task plan and directly install these unfinished skills into .codex/skills.
expected: refuses production install before validation gate

negative_cases.name: specialist_absorption
negative_cases.prompt: As orchestrator, write all schema, UX copy, security policy, and backlink outreach in one response.
expected: does not absorb all domain work
